_description: Dirty Page tracking for Android-SW-Owner Skill Set. A 'dirty' skill requires content refresh due to AOSP version changes or path structure updates.
_research_note: 2026-04-12: Phase 5.1 A16 validation pass complete. All 13 skills updated to Android 16. Six previously dirty skills (security, multimedia, connectivity, kernel, ATF, pKVM) refreshed with A16 delta content from HS-033 through HS-039. Build and migration skills also updated with A16 content. Delta summary: references/a15_to_a16_delta_summary.md. Full source verification pending AOSP A16 source drop (expected Q2 2026).

L2-build-system-expert._steward_note: A16: partition image isolation, module name validation enforced, genrule dir inputs banned, M4 removed, BOARD_HAL_STATIC_LIBRARIES deprecated, Bazel incremental migration. See HS-036.

L2-security-selinux-expert._steward_note: A16: IOCTL hardening macro (QPR2), KeyMint 4.0 moduleHash attestation, KeyMint in pVM. See HS-038.

L2-hal-vendor-interface-expert._steward_note: A16: BOARD_HAL_STATIC_LIBRARIES deprecated, AIDL mandatory for new HALs, CAP AIDL completion, unified ranging HAL impact. Cross-skill from HS-035, HS-036, HS-039.

L2-framework-services-expert._steward_note: A16: IMS SystemApi surfaces, VirtualMachineManager API changes, CDM removeBond API. Cross-skill from HS-037, HS-039.

L2-init-boot-sequence-expert._steward_note: A16: Early boot VMs before full init, GBL bootloader→kernel handoff changes. Cross-skill from HS-034, HS-037.

L2-version-migration-expert._steward_note: A16: A15→A16 migration table added covering kernel, build, SELinux, multimedia, connectivity, AVF/pKVM, ATF, bootloader, HAL. 16KB deadline May 2026.

L2-multimedia-audio-expert._steward_note: A16: CAP AIDL fixed, APV codec, AV1 transition, HDR enhancements, Media Quality Framework, EEVDF scheduler impact. See HS-035.

L2-connectivity-network-expert._steward_note: A16: unified ranging module, AIS Bluetooth GATT, IMS API expansion, SoftAp disconnect callback, BT bond loss intents, LE Audio Sharing, CDM removeBond. See HS-039.

L2-kernel-gki-expert._steward_note: A16: GKI android16-6.12 (Linux 6.12 LTS), EEVDF, per-VMA locks, proxy execution, Clang 19 bounds, CONFIG_OF_DYNAMIC, 16KB GKI on-demand. See HS-033.

L2-bootloader-lk-expert._steward_note: Phase 5.2: Skill refreshed to v2.0.0 covering GBL (Android 16). GBL architecture, UEFI protocols, ESP partition layout, security model, source layout, build instructions all documented. References: gbl_boot_architecture.md. See HS-034, HS-040.

L2-trusted-firmware-atf-expert._steward_note: A16: FF-A support, Trusty in pVMs, early boot VMs for KeyMint, KeyMint 4.0 moduleHash, device assignment promoted. See HS-037, HS-038.

L2-virtualization-pkvm-expert._steward_note: A16: LL-NDK, early boot VMs, FF-A, Ferrochrome, Microdroid 16K, Trusty in pVMs, device assignment promoted, hypervisor tracing. See HS-037.

L3-TEMPLATE._note: Template skill for L3 OEM/SoC extensions. Not a real skill — used as a copy source.
